name: Data Visualization
description: Transforms complex datasets into clear, compelling visual formats such as charts, graphs, and dashboards that drive actionable insights for advertising campaigns.

variables.name: data
variables.description: Raw data to visualize (table, CSV format, or dataset summary)

variables.name: chart_type
variables.description: Type of chart: line, bar, pie, scatter, heatmap, area

variables.name: context
variables.description: Business context or question the visualization answers

variables.name: audience
variables.description: Who will view this: client, executive, internal team

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Raw data to visualize (table, CSV format, or dataset summary)

inputs.description: Type of chart: line, bar, pie, scatter, heatmap, area

inputs.name: context
inputs.description: Business context or question the visualization answers

inputs.name: audience
inputs.description: Who will view this: client, executive, internal team
